comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Closed `BIG-PAR-214` after landing lease-safety hardening for shared queue coordination.

What changed:
- Lease renewals now fail closed after expiry across queue backends; sqlite renew requires the lease to still be valid at renewal time and can return `ErrLeaseExpired`.
- Worker runtime treats lease loss as a first-class outcome (cancels execution and requeues with `LastTransition=\"lease.lost\"`, tracking renewal failures and lost runs).
- Cancelled+leased runs are purged after lease expiry across backends to avoid stuck cancelled work if a worker dies.
- Prometheus counters exported for lease renewal failures and lease-lost runs.

Validation:
- `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok
- `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync status --json` -> local SHA `469cb3b79698e3596096fc79d46132d4fc1dff02` matches remote SHA `469cb3b79698e3596096fc79d46132d4fc1dff02` with `status: ok`, `synced: true`, `pushed: true`

- `5edec4a88680237c9989db81a1f0c85d1159057a`
